title: Stop clear text credentials exposure
remediation:
1. Review this security control list of exposed entities.
2. Research why those entities are using LDAP in clear text.
3. Remediate the issues and stop the exposure.
4. After confirming remediation, we recommend you configure the requirement of domain controller level LDAP signing.
To achieve a full score, you must remediate all exposed entities.
remediationImpact: A user or an application that relies on these types of clear text authentication may stop functioning.
